entry.title: Material Sales Org Distr Channel Customer not found
entry.content:
When attempting to transfer data directly from ECC to S4, I get the errors, "Material XXX in sales org. 1030 distribution channel 10 is not defined" and "Material Sales Org Distr Channel Customer not found".  The material does exist in S4 in that sales org/dc.  I am not quite sure about the 2nd error, since the customer has also been extended to the 1030/10 sales org./dc.

In addition, for some records I got the message Text type “” has not been defined

However, I am able to create the above directly with the fiori app/SAP GUI.

Anyone came across this?

entry.title: default values for action parameters from function in the behavior of RAP in Odata v4

I made an action with parameters 

and i want to put default values in this parameter , so i created a function GetDefaultsForGET_SERIAL

i am trying to default it in the action like this : 

but it is not supported in my release . 

so i am trying to add it in the annotation file : 

it works with ODATA V2 with these annotations : 

but i am trying in ODATA V4 but not working: 

can any one help ?

Regards
Tomas

Does anyone know if we can use a Migration Cockpit for migrate from SAP TM Cloud extra stack to TM 

embedded SAP S/4HANA?

entry.title: HCM Brasil: eSocial – Ajuste no evento S-1010 para a licença-maternidade estendida
entry.content:
Olá pessoal,

No dia 5 de abril de 2024 foi publicada a Instrução Normativa RFB N° 2.185/2024. Com isso, o evento S-1010 foi alterado para que rubricas de licença-maternidade estendida não sejam consideradas para base de INSS Patronal.

A partir de agora, estas rubricas devem ser geradas com o campo codIncCP (Código de incidência tributária da rubrica para a Previdência Social) com o valor 15 (Exclusiva do segurado - Mensal).

Para se adequar a essa alteração na legislação, a SAP já realizou a entrega através da SAP Note 3462645 – eSocial S-1010 – Normative Instruction RFB No. 2185/2024 – field codIncCP reports with value 15.

Após a instalação da SAP Note é necessário atualizar a classe de processamento 77 (Identificação de rubricas de base de INSS patronal) com o valor 1 (Rubr.licença maternidade não considerada para base de INSS Patronal) para suas rubricas de licença-maternidade estendida:

Importante: As seguintes rubricas não são afetadas por esta alteração:

  • /T80 (Sal. Maternidade – Mensal)
  • /T85 (Sal. Maternidade – Médias)
  • /T90 (Sal. Maternidade – Horas)

A lista completa de entregas do eSocial do ano de 2024 está disponibilizada na SAP Note  3418378 - eSocial - Overview – 2024.

Gostou desse post? Dê um Like e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas.

entry.title: Cannot read properties of undefined | SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Builders,

I have created a process to read pdf, and write an excel file with its findings. There will be situations where the pdf read will not find values for certain fields of my data type. I want to write the Excel file anyway, regardless of whether or not there is data for every field. I am wondering how to get around this issue and move on? Any suggestions would be greatly appreciated.

This is the component:

The error I receive: Cannot read properties of undefined "Cannot read properties of undefined"

 

 

 

 

Thank you,

Julien

entry.title: Sales orders are not displayed in COGS
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

User has informed, many Sales orders are not displayed in COGS. For Sales Order , I Used VA03 to display Sales Order. For COGS, which T.code should i use? If the sales Order are not avilable in COGS, how to post them so that sales orders are displayed in COGS?

All the help will be greatly appreicated.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Re: Interest Posting is generated on the same date as as...
entry.content:
HI Charmaine,

I am not sure what you are planning to do? But if you migrate per the first of March (01.03.2024) this is also the date which you must use in the Net Worth Value condition and as Start of consideration.

The contract will start per 01.03.2024 with a migrated value on this date and postings from 01.03.2024.

Best regards,

Jeroen

entry.title: How to use Digital Manufacturing MDOs within Custom Plugins – Example: Where Used Report
entry.content:
Hi all,
in this blog I would like to share with you my learning experience and a sample result that I gained while solving a common customer requirement for having a Where Used Report including the option to trigger follow-up activities.

The challenge was solved using existing Digital Manufacturing features.

I have divided the challenge into 2 parts:

  1. Business Logic: Using Digital Manufacturing Master Data Objects (MDOs) in combination with Production Process Design. See the blog How to use Digital Manufacturing MDOs within PPD Example: Where-Used Report with Follow-up Actions for details
  2. UI: Building a Custom Plugin to create a UI to visualize the result of the Where used query and to trigger follow-up actions. Focus of this Blog.

Credit goes to my colleague Vivekananda Panigrahy who helped me with  all my questions.  Without him, this would not be possible.

Note: The example is set up and tested using Production Orders and Work Center POD following the guidelines for using MDOs as described in the Note: 3324908 - Additional information on Digital Manufacturing for insights APIs

Use Case Example

Business Process Flow


Figure 1: General Business Flow

As introduced in my first BLOG we want to identify where specific components are used.

In the blog How to use Digital Manufacturing MDOs within PPD Example: Where-Used Report with Follow-up Actions I have explained in detail the scenario and how the backend service (Production Process Design PPD) was built to retrieve the SFCs for which a specific Inventory ID (component) is used.

Now we want to provide the business user with a UI and allow them to trigger specific actions for selected SFCs.

Therefore, the user needs the following capabilities.

  1. Trigger a search for a specific Inventory ID
  2. Display the SFCs found including detailed contextual information such as material, current status etc.
  3. Being able to specific SFCs from the result and trigger follow-up actions.

Let’s have a look at the different requirements and how we can solve them using Digital Manufacturing extension options in combination with SAP BTP and SAP UI5 technology.

Implementation

In my solution approach I have chosen to build:

  1. A custom plugin that allows
    1. integration of the UI as a tile into the Digital Manufacturing Launchpad
    2. flexible configuration of the PPD endpoint. This is important if you want to deploy it in multiple landscapes.
  2. Digital Manufacturing SFC Details MDO Public API
    1. easily retrieve additional information for each SFC found in the Production Process Design
    2. MDO Public API is an ODATA service that supports the use of SAP UI5 Smart Controls
  3. SAP UI5 Smart Table component
    1. use the built-in features of Smart Table such as filtering, sorting, grouping, Excel export.

Custom Plugin Development

I have shared the code on https://github.com/SAP-samples/digital-manufacturing-extension-samples/tree/main/dm-extension-scenarios/whereUsedReport

You can easily download and try it yourself. However, I would like to mention some personal key learnings here.

Basic Custom POD Plugin

I followed Kevin Hunter’s instructions  as described in his blog Building a custom Digital Manufacturing Cloud POD Plugin the easy way to create a basic POD Plugin.

This was really a jump start and I recommend taking a look at this blog.

As configuration options I have defined

  • Title

The title which is displayed on the header of the plugin

  • Description
    Additional information for the user
  • PPD ID to retrieve list of SFCs
    Here we enter the Reg ID of the PPD that is called to get the SFCs where the component is used. The ID can be found in the Service Registry and defines the endpoint of the API we are calling.


Figure 2 Manage Service Registry entry

UI

The UI is very basic.  

Figure 3: Where Used Plugin UI

  • Search area: Input field and search button to start the search.
  • Result area: To display the result, I chose a SmartTable UI to take advantage of built in features like grouping, filtering, exporting to Excel etc.

    My conclusion: Smart Table combined with OData is really great. With the huge number of built- in features, it is very easy to build a great UI.

To be able to select the different rows and trigger a follow-up action, I have configured a responsive table within the Smart Table. This allows me to select the rows and pass the data to e.g. to a PPD or any other function within the plugin.

An important feature I also used in the table is the growing parameter.  Here we can define the threshold so that we can easily configure a lazy load in case of a lot of entries in the result.

Controller Logic

Using the OData Model and Smart Tables is very powerful, but it also had some pitfalls that we had to solve.

The OData Model that is retrieved and displayed as result is defined in the manifest.json and points to the Digital Manufacturing Master Data Object endpoint.

The entity set we use is the SFC MDO.

Figure 4: Manifest.json

To ensure that the OData Model is loaded before assigning it to the view, we used the ODataModel API metadata Loaded, which returns a promise accordingly.

Without this, I run into errors when loading the plugin. The view is then missing data.

Figure 5: MainView.Controller.js onInit

The Smart Table will adjust the OData $filter, $select etc. according to the configuration as well as how we defined the filters depending on the search logic.

Sample: https://dmc-az-cons-training.test.execution.eu20.dmc.cloud.sap/sapdmdmepod/fnd/api-gateway-ms/dmci/v1/extractor/SFC?$skip=0&$top=5&$filter=Plant%20eq%20%27EP01%27&$select=Plant%2cSfc%2cOrder%2cMaterial%2cStatus

To set the filter, we first need to get the SFCs, where the component is used by calling the PPD we have configured.

To be able to call it synchronously, the function _retrieveWhereComponentUsed (call to the PPD) has been implemented using a promise function.

Without this, we run into problems calling the following steps where we built the filter for the OData call.

Figure 6: MainView.controller.js onEnterCompId

Conclusion

With Digital Manufacturing Extensibility Options such as Custom Plugin and OData APIs, we can easily build a nice UI for a Where Used Report including the option to trigger follow-up action based on business needs.

In this blog post, you also learned how to build a report that retrieves data from a PPD, using MDOs OData APIs in combination with SAP UI5 Smart table including the option to trigger follow-up actions based on user selection.

Do you like this post? Please let me know what you think in the comments section.  Any feedback is greatly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please visit the SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thank you,
Katja

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing 24.05 Release Highlights
entry.content:
📢SAP Digital Manufacturing 24.05 Release is planned for 11th of May for Quality and 25th of May for Productive spaces 📢

For this release, many brand new capabilities and really cool innovations are planned (*subject to change), see my personal Top 5 below:

💎General Availability of the redesigned AI/ML Visual Inspection capability
💎Enhanced Electronic Signature Log plugin to display previously logged signatures
💎Real-Time Monitoring in Dispatching and Monitoring, enabling real-time monitoring of production schedules and order execution
💎Line Monitor enhancements, including displaying the five latest Indicator Values using Last Indicator Value plugin and introducing Filter Bar and Shift Progress plugins
💎New Resource Time Tracking capability

Other new capabilities and planned innovations are:

⭐Global Variables support in Production Processes
⭐New MDOs: ElectronicSignature, UserCertificationAssignment
⭐Enhanced Role Templates to improve authorization scope and granularity
⭐Enhanced Overall Equipment Effectiveness with changes to calculation of the performance KPI
⭐Added Installation Point field to Assemble Components and Component List plugins, and API endpoints
⭐Resource time tracking capability, including activity types of Production Time and Resource Usage and brand new Production Time On, Production Time Off, Resource Usage On, Resource Usage Off plugins
⭐Business Settings enhancements, including user anonymization, Enabling a BOM Without Components, new Resource Time Tracking settings, Operation Activity Version setting, etc
⭐BOMs without Components support
⭐Third-Party MQTT Brokers support
⭐Quality Management POD Plugins in Design Production Process support
⭐In-App Notifications overall appearance and functionality improvements
⭐Support of OEE Reason Codes during Scrap posting
⭐Renaming of Alert 2.0 apps
⭐Enhanced several APIs and other new APIs are introduced
⭐Enhancement of Collaboration Directives
⭐Enhancement of Goods Receipt plugin to generate handling unit numbers
⭐After Acceptance/Rejection Characteristics are introduced in in Quality Inspection
⭐Activity Confirmation Eenhancements with regards to ERP integration and user anonymization
⭐Disabling SFC Start in the Nonconformance Data Entry Plugin
⭐CPI Async Mode is introduced

Some deprecated features and capabilities are:

❌Manage Mail Server Configurations App, as mail server config is now handled as a Destination in SAP BTP Cockpit
❌Legacy AI/ML Visual Inspection apps and plugins
❌Legacy Alert apps

Keep an eye in SAP Note #3435403 - Additional Information and Manual Activities for SAP Digital Manufacturing, Release 2405, for relevant and important information about this release.

Learn more about the planned scope (*subject to change) of 24.05 Release at What's New Viewer.

Experiencing SAP Digital Manufacturing

You can have a glimpse and experience several aspects of SAP Digital Manufacturing via the Interactive Value Journeys below:

Discrete within SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud
Process Industry within SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud
Tool Management within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Resource Orchestration within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Production Process Design within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Shop Floor Orchestration with SAP Digital Manufacturing
Time Tracking within SAP Digital Manufacturing
SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
Nonconformances Processes within SAP Digital Manufacturing
Discrete Manufacturing in Private Cloud, powered by SAP
Discrete Manufacturing in Public Cloud, powered by SAP
Process Industry Manufacturing with SAP Digital Manufacturing and S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
AI-driven Visual Inspection (BETA) powered by SAP


Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Advanced Financial Closing in SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am currently evaluating the Advanced Financial Closing. According to the SAP information, it should be possible to connect the Advanced Financial Closing to SAP ECC (see OSS https://me.sap.com/notes/2873915).

As part of a PreSales case, I came across the fact that there is no possibility to store the task type “transaction code” in the business transactions, but only the task types “Fiori app application” and “job”.

Is it a mandatory requirement to have the Fiori interface installed for the backend system in order to use Advanced Financial Closing?

Thank you very much for your feedback.

entry.title: How to configure RF device (without access SICF) in the S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
I don´t access SICF to see (publish) the service for RF devices. How do I find the service up in WM Public to configure RF device? Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to configure RF device (without access SICF) in t...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

You can use the SICF service "EWM_MOBGUI" or you can use an URL that follows the following pattern: https://<server>/sap/bc/gui/sap/its/ewm_mobgui?~transaction=/scwm/rfui&sap-language=EN.

For further information on configuring the RF device, and also the restrictions it has, please check the documentation below:

3048632 - Information and restrictions for mobile data terminals in Warehouse Management in S/4HANA Cloud or EWM in SAP S/4HANA On-Premise

I hope this helps! 

Anything please follow up on this topic for further discussion.

 

Best regards,

Geovana

entry.title: Unleash the power of Business AI across your Cloud ERP environment!
entry.content:
It’s safe to say that AI is everywhere. It’s often a case of “the answer is AI, what’s the question”?

The reality is that business landscapes are rapidly evolving, driven by innovative technologies like Cloud ERP and Business AI.

The business data now available in Cloud ERP systems, complimented by unstructured data from external sources provide a foundation to change the way we make decisions, empower users, automate processes, and predict the future.

Trust in the data and AI recommendations

But AI is only as good as the data it is analyzing.

SAP’s customers provide products that run the world, from baby milk formula to the vehicles that move us from place to place. They look for business systems that help them grow, predict, and adapt to risks, opportunities, and ever-changing business dynamics. And they need to be confident that the decisions they make based on AI generated insights and recommendations are accurate and informed.

Wouldn’t you want AI from someone who has decades of experience of running serious businesses and business processes?

Welcome to Business AI

Business AI leveraging machine learning and natural language processing, analyses this data to generate insights and automate tasks.

This powerful combination of Cloud ERP and Business AI empowers businesses to transform operations, gain deeper insights, and make data-driven decisions with unprecedented accuracy.

As Deloitte’s Subit J. Mathew explained in a recent Future of ERP podcast, “ERPs of the future will be composable, and what makes them composable is a robust foundation like SAP, steering it with human creativity and powering it with AI and intelligent technologies. Essentially moving us from human augmentation to human automation as time progresses.”

With SAP Business AI, we build the system of intelligence with three core principles:

  • Relevant: Everything is embedded into our leading enterprise applications and business technology solutions. Customers can count on their SAP systems to be futureproofed with the most relevant AI experiences in the context of their business.
  • Reliable: Based on the unique business data AND business process context, we can deliver the most reliable business AI. Your AI is only as good as your data – we have the most important data and the only one with business data context intact.
  • Responsible: We deliver AI with the highest levels of concern for security, privacy, compliance, and ethics. SAP has the right character to deliver AI responsibly. Ironically, the more responsibly one builds AI technology, the freer an organization is to use it.

    Creating an AI Business Strategy

    This underscores the necessity for businesses to thoroughly assess and comprehend various related aspects to craft a robust AI Business Strategy. The key is to identify your business challenges you need to address, the use cases that will improve your business, and then determine how best to address them.

    The possible applications for AI in the business context seem endless, but how do you turn this potential into tangible value? What scenarios will work best for your business? How do you build an AI strategy?  And how will AI align with your specific operational requirements?

    As Subit explained in the podcast, “AI is really about doing things that you do today differently, and being able to do different things that you could never do before!”

    We discussed how companies need to segment their AI strategies into three distinct categories:

    • Improve efficiency to do the things it does today in a different, more accelerated fashion.
    • Improve the user experience to become more intuitive and provide contextual information.
    • Deliver new processes and innovation previously not had in the organization.

      A lot of companies are looking at establishing AI Center of Excellence, which really look at it from multiple perspectives and involves answering several questions:

      What is the right governance model you want to put in place around what initiatives do you even prioritize?

      • How do you prioritize the use cases you want to go after?
      • How do you quantify the value of what you want to go after?
      • What is the technology fabric that you're going to use to accomplish this?

        This is the value of where an ERP platform such as SAP comes in. If you combine them with some of the large language models out there, it opens itself up to doing remarkable things.

        To learn more, listen to the Future of ERP podcast: Generative AI and ERP with Deloitte’s Subit Mathew.

        And join us at the upcoming Sapphire and ASUG Annual Conference in Orlando on June 3rd - 5th where you will discover the power of Business AI for Cloud ERP that’s reliable, relevant to your business, and responsible by design.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content:
Is it May, Mai or M-AI challenge 😉

Nearly right:

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing Interactive Value Journeys (IVJs)
entry.content:
Interactive Value Journeys (IVJs) are a great way to experience and learn more about SAP solutions via a value-centric, persona-based and contextualized story, helping SAP customers and partners to understand SAP's portfolio and solutions, and the value for their business.

Over time, I created 13+ Interactive Value Journeys (IVJs) covering SAP Digital Manufacturing features, capabilities and stories. All these IVJs are now available in a central place, a single playlist, from where they can be easily consumed and broadly shared. 

I invite you all to check the newly released SAP Digital Manufacturing IVJ Playlist, and share it broadly.

I hope you like it! Thanks,

Manoel Costa

entry.title: Multi Combo box with input control in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am using the Multi Combo box with input from the marketplace. I have a requirement to set some values in the list as selected during load of the app. For this i used the Set component property from marketplace and tried to set the SelectedTokenList. I was able to set the list to the control but after this the list in the multi combo box is not shown.

Can anyone help me to set the values in the multi combo box with input control and still get the list bound to the combo box.

Thank you,

Navya

entry.title: Document transfer from RCM to Onboarding 2.0
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to transfer the documents uploaded by the candidate in RCM to the review new-hire data page of onboarding 2.0 through CPI. Can anyone help if you have already achieved a solution by this kind of integration?

Regards,

Roma

entry.title: Re: SAP Alert Notification Service : Send Notifications to E-mail, Microsoft teams
entry.content:
Hi! Great post!

I have a question, regarding the email action behavior: is it possible to include more than one email address in the action? I have to notify a group about some events, but I could not set the field with another value than just one email address.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Auto populating standard field to custom field in Job...
entry.content:
Hello,

Were you able to solve this issue, wanted to know how did you manage this? I am facing the same issue now.

I am mapping standard Recruiter field which is autopopulating from position and now I have to auto populate to a custom Text field on a req.

Regards,

Varsha

entry.title: Re: Can the plan viewer be used stand-alone?
entry.content: The Plan Viewer is only accessible via DBISQL. There is not a direct way to start in the plan viewer but you can open an existing plan (.saplan) by double clicking on the file in windows or pass the plan file when starting from the command line i.e., dbisql ... MyPlan.saplan. You can also create a plan using the GRAPHICAL_PLAN sql function.

entry.title: Re: Creation of OData service with implementation of CRUD methods and `deep insert` method from scra
entry.content:
It's great that you've shared the code on GitHub and detailed steps using Eclipse.

This is a very old subject that has been written about extensively beginning from 2014 on SAP Community. Unfortunately, the new website makes it extremely difficult to search for the existing posts but here are some from the top of Google search.
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/multi-deep-insert-in-sapgateway-segw-approach/ba-p/13128422

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/step-by-step-development-for-create-deep-entity-operation/ba-p/13074869

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/multi-deep-insert-in-sapgateway-segw-approach/ba-p/13128422

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/step-by-step-procedure-for-create-deep-entity-in-post-operation/ba-p/13223107

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/steps-to-create-deep-insert-odata/ba-p/13349248

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/easy-way-to-write-data-via-a-deep-entity-in-odata/ba-p/13539510

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-implement-multi-level-create-deep/ba-p/13199274

You can see most of them contain pretty much the same information. It's nice that your post also includes the data generation piece, although it would be logical to use the service itself to do that, no? What is missing in most posts and this one is the high-level explanation of why are you doing this, the overview of steps involved (and why), and pointing out the limitations of example (e.g. I see SELECT *, there is no way this will support full OData request range).

Most posts just go right into "start creating stuff". It's not wrong but I find it difficult to work with developers who just blindly learn "step by step" and have no idea what they're doing in general. Also again, a lot has been written about this already. At this point, I think it's reasonable to expect the posts not just repeating same steps but be more like "hey, I read these posts but X was not clear" or "I have a better example", etc. Thank you though at least for acknowledging this is an old approach. Some authors don't even do that.

entry.title: Re: SAP Alert Notification Service : Send Notifications to E-mail, Microsoft teams
entry.content: One option would be to create a second action that emails a second email address.  I believe multiple actions can be added to a subscription.  I think for emailing a group, this would be best handled by the creation of a distribution list or dl with your company email.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Apps in BTP - How to Handle Output Files from Fiori (PDF)
entry.content:
We are developing our first fiori app - in BTP.    This app creates purchase orders and sales orders in our ECC system.    When the purchase/sales order is saved in SAP it generates a PDF output confirmation that we send to our customer and supplier by email.

Additionally we would like our fiori app to autosave these files to a shared network drive that is accessible from our ECC PRD server. 

Does anyone have any information or resources or experience building Fiori apps in BTP and how do you handle outputs from that system (whether they are PDF or Excel or any other format)?

I posted this question a couple of weeks ago to the Technology community (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/btp-apps-amp-saving-outputs-to-local-network-storage/qaq-p/13673743) but got no response.

Any feedback or ideas would be appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hi Community,
Excited to be here!

entry.title: Re: How to Update Table ARBCIG_SYSTIDMAP With BAPI or FM
entry.content: have you find the solution you need for this? currently in need of the same requirement. Please let me know if you have the FM/BAPI to make this work.

entry.title: Re: Issue with Depreciation Area Values in Assets
entry.content:
Hello,

Please check the below configuration:

SPRO-->IMG --> Financial Accounting (New) or Financial Accounting --> Asset Accounting -> Valuation--> Depreciation Areas --> Specify Transfer of APC Values

In your case, you will see Depreciation 02 is the adoption value from Depreciation Area 01, you may try changing this setting in your system and test it out.

Br, Vivek

entry.title: Default "Display as List option" in FBV3
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

If a document is parked using BAPI, when the user displays it in FBV3 or FBV2 it displays as Classic Display. Is there a setting or parameter (like FB00) that can default the display as ALV Classic?

Regards,

Vivek

entry.title: Internal Error using Quick Copy - SBO
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I'am having an Internal Error (-1) [131-183] using Quick Copy (#QuickCopy).

1 month ago it works perfectly and now 1 DB gives me thie error and 1 DB not.

Does someone have an idea?

Thanks a lot,

Francesca

entry.title: Re: Can we use BAPI inside Customer Exits or BADIs?
entry.content:
Yes we can use bapi inside badi .

I have worked on one requirement where badi is used to populate a bapi as some fields were not available in bapi so that it can be executed successfully.

entry.title: Re: Performance tuning techniques
entry.content:
There are so many performance tuning techniques in sap abap coding .

Few of them are very common and listed below :

1. Parallel cursor technique 

2. For all entries in 

3. select joins 

4. Using text elements to remove unnecessary ATC check errors and code inspector errors.

5. Debugging

entry.title: SuccessFactors Learning Subject Matter Expert Office Hours (English)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Registration details can be found here (Authentication Required)

Please join us and our Recognized Expert partners as we jointly host our Subject Matter Expert office hours!

If you have questions about your SuccessFactors Learning product regarding best practices, use cases, 'how to' questions, etc. then please join our call and we'll have our expert answer your question live.

These sessions are held in an open online forum with other customers participating. There is no pre-planned content or presentation. Time is spent answering the questions you bring to the call. No advance registration required.

Note: Attendees can use the in-system audio and have the system call you directly or attendees can call in manually. To locate the call-in number for your region along with the passcode, please click on the information dropdown in the upper right corner of the meeting (indicated by an italicized i in a circle icon).

Each session is held twice per month.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Recruiting Subject Matter Expert Office Hours (English)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Registration details can be found here (Authentication Required)

Please join us and our Recognized Expert partners as we jointly host our Subject Matter Expert office hours!

If you have questions about your SuccessFactors Recruiting product regarding best practices, use cases, 'how to' questions, etc. then please join our call and we'll have our expert answer your question live.

These sessions are held in an open online forum with other customers participating. There is no pre-planned content or presentation. Time is spent answering the questions you bring to the call. No advance registration required.

Note: Attendees can use the in-system audio and have the system call you directly or attendees can call in manually. To locate the call-in number for your region along with the passcode, please click on the information dropdown in the upper right corner of the meeting (indicated by an italicized i in a circle icon).

Each session is held twice per month.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Recruiting Posting Subject Matter Expert Office Hours (French/English)
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Registration details can be found with our full schedule here (Authentication Required)

Please join us for our Recruiting Posting Subject Matter Expert office hours!

If you have questions about your SuccessFactors Recruiting Posting product regarding best practices, use cases, 'how to' questions, etc. then please join our call and we'll have our expert answer your question live.

These sessions are held in an open online forum with other customers participating. There is no pre-planned content or presentation. Time is spent answering the questions you bring to the call. No advance registration required.


Note: Attendees can use the in-system audio and have the system call you directly or attendees can call in manually. To locate the call-in number for your region along with the passcode, please click on the information dropdown in the upper right corner of the meeting (indicated by an italicized i in a circle icon).

entry.title: SuccessFactors Customer Onboarding Webinar - North America
entry.content:
PLEASE NOTE: Selecting the ‘Will you be attending?’ option will NOT register you for the event.

To register for this event, please click here: Register Here

SuccessFactors Customer Onboarding Webinar Series (English)

Whether SAP SuccessFactors is new to you or your organization, we are excited to welcome you to the SuccessFactors Family! Join our monthly Customer Onboarding webinar to learn how to get started with SuccessFactors, see the key resources available to you, and lots more. What to expect?

  • Getting started: System access and S-User Management
  • SAP Product Support Best Practices
  • SuccessFactors Training Resources and Offerings
  • Live Demo of our one-stop-shop: The SAP SuccessFactors Customer Community

This is a MUST to get you started on a successful journey with SuccessFactors!

Please contact SAP_HXM_Onboarding@sap.com for any questions on this webinar series.

Here is a link to our Global schedule

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Apps in BTP - How to Handle Output Files from Fiori (PDF)
entry.content: SAP already has readily available archiving solutions for output. Not sure why you would try to build that into an application BTP in place of using something that exists for archiving documents.

entry.title: Re: Creating ABAP Dataframes for SAP PAL
entry.content: Thank you for the hint. In fact, I didn't know this API. I think internally they use again the DDIF FMs, which is a pity, since these FM are not transactional secure. Furthermore the API looks a little bit over- engineered.

To register for this event, please click here: Register Here

entry.title: Re: SAP Alert Notification Service : Send Notifications to E-mail, Microsoft teams
entry.content:
Thank you Dan,

Yes, I created a second action that works, but it forces me to replicate the email properties (subject and body). It's not a big deal, but it could be more flexible if more than one email address can be used in one action. I have to test using a distribution list, anyway.

entry.title: ACH/ WIRE RETURN Process in S/4 Hana
entry.content:
ACH/ WIRE RETURN Process in S/4 Hana

Problem Statement:

ACH or wire returns are received in Electronic Bank Statement for the paid invoices. The return process needs to be applied to the invoices and reset the payments.

Since returns are usually not received soon, the actual payments are already cleared/reconciled with bank statements.

To reissue the correct payments, the reversal original payment would not possible unless bank reconciliation postings are reverted which if done can open all payments received in that bank statement. To avoid such hassles, Account Payables team posts duplicate invoice.

Adverse Impact of the existing process:

  • Duplicate postings for one invoice
  • Account Payables & Bank Reconciliation issues.
  • Delays in Audit Reporting
  • Issues with 1099 reporting due to over tax exposure for supplier due duplicate invoice postings & payments.

The following document suggests the best way to manage ACH/Wire returns:

Instructions for the Treasury Team

Step1: Apply the ACH/Wire return received in Bank Statement using “Reprocess Bank Statement Items” Fiori App”

 

Step2: Select “Post to G/L Account” and then select “Add.”  Enter and Post ACH/wire return amount to Accounts Payable adjustment GL account viz. 2100XXX.

 

Step3: Select “Simulate” to ensure the accounting and posting date are correct and post.

 

Step4: Now, we need to find the original ACH/wire payment which cleared in SAP. Get the bank reconciliation clearing document from there and reverse the entire batch. The posting period should be the date of the ACH/wire return. This is needed to allow reversal of the payments.

 

Step5: Reprocess all the payments under the ACH payment batch except for the returned payment (note: this step is not necessary for wire payments). Select “Post to G/L Account” and debit same AP adjustment GL account 2100XXX for the returned ACH/wire payment amount.

 

Step6: Select “Simulate” to ensure the accounting and posting date are correct and post.

 

Step7: The Treasury Team will send an email to the Accounts Payable Team to show a payment was returned and provide the supporting information from the Bank.

 

Instructions for the AP Team

Step8: Confirm A/P invoice is open- Reset and Reverse the payment document.

  • Please note if the ACH/wire return occurred during A/P close, the A/P team will need to book the following reversing journal in GL SAP, until A/P opens in the following period. This Journal entry will auto reverse in first working day of the following month.

Dr ACH/Wire Clearing Account                               XXXX
Cr AP adjustment Account                                                                                        XXXX

  • AP team will reset and reverse in the first working day of the following month.

If ACH/WIRE return received on 28th of Feb-2024, AP will book a JE in SAP GL with posting date of 28th Feb-2024. This JE will be reversed on 1st March -2024. (First working day of the month). AP will reset and reverse the payment document with the with the posting date of 01st March-2024.

Original Payment for Returns

 

 

 Step9: Go to the “Reset cleared items” App window displaying the payment document to be reversed.

 

Step10: Select the “Reset and Reverse” option (use the date of the return for the posting date) in case in same month.

Step11: Now you can see payment reversal document.

 

Step12: Confirm reversed document. The original invoice is open to repayment and no duplicate invoice needs to be posted.

Once, reason of payment failure is resolved you can repay the supplier.

Please find below the accounting entries for the ACH /Wire return process

                                                            Debit                      Credit

                                                                                    

1) Initial Invoice processed in AP

 

Expense

  

    2,216.12

 
 

A/P

  

    -2,216.12

     

2) Initial Invoice paid in AP

  

A/P

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Bank Clearing Account

  

   - 2,216.12

     

3) Initial Payment Cleared (EBS File)

 

Bank Clearing Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Cash Account

  

    -2,216.12

     

4) ACH Return (EBS File)

  

Cash Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

AP Adjustment Account

  

    -2,216.12

     

5) Reverse Initial Payment Cleared (EBS File)

Cash Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Bank Clearing Account

  

    -2,216.12

     

AP Adjustment Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Cash Account

  

   - 2,216.12

     

7) AP Team Reverse Initial Payment

 

Bank Clearing Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

A/P

  

   - 2,216.12

     

😎 AP Team Reissues Payment

  

A/P

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Bank Clearing Account

  

   - 2,216.12

     

9) Reissued Payment Cleared (EBS File)

 

Bank Clearing Account

  

    2,216.12

 
 

Cash Account

  

   - 2,216.12

The ACH/Wire return process explained above is simple and easily adoptable. It helps us resolves all the adverse impacts of faulty process and ensures accurate reporting. Hope, this document equips you well to tackle his problem in future.

entry.title: Re: Product Alert Update Dec 19 – SAP Analytics Cloud and Google Chrome
entry.content: We have a new updated blog here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/third-party-cookies-and-sap-analytics-cloud/ba-p/13672672

entry.title: Re: Source CDS metadata incorrect with Replication Flow
entry.content: I am having the exact same issue. The meta data support from CDS views in general is frustrating. When you replicate remote tables, it ignores the "@EndUserText: {label: " unless you first cast the column to break the base table metadata label. For Replication flows, it completely ignores the "@EndUserText:" {label: and sets the business and technical name to the same values. I'll try to get SAP's attention on this one... See if we can get an update.

entry.title: Re: Hands-on Video Tutorials for Developing Multitenant Business Applications
entry.content:
Hello, 

All the links to the videos in the youtube is removed. I am looking for the videos of creating MTA based applications with custom schema seperation. Please help in finding them.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I am a US Army Veteran who is looking to grow my career in SAP. Particularly implementation consulting. I’ve been using SAP for the past 3 years in regard to Materials Management and currently Procurement. I also have a bachelor’s degree in operations management from Arizona State University.

I am writing to request a receive a certification attempt.

 

Thank you,

Gabe

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Great initiative again, thanks to the whole team for this new 2022 version!


I just can't get it why comparing it to 1909 it has to compile absolutely everything and so slow. Even inserting a favorite transaction (for the first time) takes a few seconds.

Thanks again, and thanks in advance for clarifying my question.

Florin

 

P.S.

Okay, your documentation answered this already:

Slow initial start of many functions / applications

For technical reasons, we have delivered this initial shipment of SAP Cloud Developer Trial without the Load. Thus, the Load must be started on the fly. Thus, the initial start of many transactions and applications will be slower.

entry.title: Re: How to improve the ADT Class Runner with additional Features
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing! Interesting approach...

I usually write my own "runner" as ABAP report. The advantage here is that I can add a selection screen to feed the parameters to the methods. (SE24 also has a basic class test tool but it's not very convenient.) I've never bothered to create something generic though because it only takes a couple of minutes to generate a custom report for this. (I just comment out the code and write new when I need variations.) But this is obviously more ABAP Cloud compliant. Neat!

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
@Jorge_Cervantes 

I've comitted the container after first run to an image without any SGEN, the resulting image size is 103G. After SGEN it became 117, so the delta by SGEN looks 14GB on my side.

entry.title: How do I develop a reservation workflow that triggers cost center owner approval?
entry.content: I want all  SAP reservations raised for consumables to go through to the cost center owner for approval. Can anyone help provide detailed steps to configure and trigger the SAP reservation workflow approval process and what would be the SAP T'code to use for that?

entry.title: Re: Using BAPI_BUPA_FS_BPADDITION_CHANGE to update table...
entry.content:
Anyone who is interested in the solution for this problem. 

With SAP Note 3402114 the problem can be solved. XO Events were not registered anymore what caused this problem.

entry.title: Re: Internal Error (-1) Occured [131-183] during Quick Co...
entry.content:
Hello Wesley,

I have the exact same problem but on SAP SQL 10.0.

How did you solve the problem? Can you help me?

Thanks,

Francesca

entry.title: Sub section in object cell
entry.content:
Hi Experts

Is it possible to have a section in an object cell that expands to show notes related to the order on click of + 

Click on - will then close the section

Is such a development supported

 Regards

entry.title: Let's meet-up in Poznań 🍻
entry.content:
Hi All. I will be in Poznań the day before the SAP CodeJam (https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/getting-started-with-machine-learning-using-sap-hana-and-python-pozna%C5%84-pl/ev-p/13660996), so if anyone is interested to join for a beer and to have a chat: please confirm, and let's meet 🍻

--Witalij

entry.title: ME49 price comparison
entry.content:
Dears

I need to add more than 1 factor in me49 not only the price factor

to compare the prices and delivery dates, freight costs , and quotations comments 

Can it be standard or need so enhancements

entry.title: Incorrect PRs for RM where FG made at external vendor and we order RM for vendor
entry.content:
My first ever question on this portal, apologies if the terms are too generic/incorrect.

 

Scenario/Set-up : I have my company target DC location "X" and an external vendor. My RM are delivered by suppliers to "X" and all of it is then posted to vendor using 541 movement at "X" and 101 movement at vendor. So, the stock on hand basically sits at vendor location. I place my POs for FG/maintain BOM/routing against "X" in ECC. 

 

The dep demand on the RM is calculated in APO at vendor level which appears as dist demand for "X". I was trying to make system to calculate/suggest me the PRs for these RM, but it doesn't make sense and I have below issues:

 

1. Timing - PR at target "X" is suggesting a delivery date where there is no requirement of an order[much advance than needed]. currently, Safety days supply maintained at vendor location with SZ method. 

 

2. Quantity : Overall qty seems to be okay, but they are coming up as multiple PRs with same date or 1 week apart[again no new production in the next 1 week window], I have min lot size and rounding value maintained at target "X" and nothing on Max lot size. 

 

3. Product Heuristic in APO is SAP_PP_002 at vendor location.

 

Please could anyone guide me thru this issue.

entry.title: Re: I have a similar issue.I started using a report was a...
entry.content:
Hi ghevia99, the Links tab will show up if there's more than 1 database object utilized on a report. If you are using a single Command object then there shouldn't be a Links tab.

Questions:

  1. What happens when you run the report directly in the Launchpad? (i.e. Not a schedule.)
  2. What happens with a brand new report based on the same Command object SQL and parameters?

entry.title: Re: Custom UI Integration Card Development in SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi @ronaldlee 
Is there anyway or anywhere that I can learn more on the parameters used in the manifest.json
Such as 
"value": "{context>sap.successfactors/currentUser/id/value}",

Not working with above so getting 401

entry.title: Re: Screen personas S4HANA Cloud
entry.content: The answer will likely depend on a specific example you have in mind. More information about the exact scenario would be necessary.

entry.title: Re: How to deploy multiple intents of same Fiori app to Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi Mike, did you ever find a solution for this to do what you intended? Or get any official feedback from SAP saying it’s not possible?

Thanks,

Brendan

entry.content:
Hello,

Please see KBA 3383303 - How to enable scimwebservices and cloudscimwebservices extension - SAP Commerce.

Regards,
Giuseppe

entry.title: Re: App with multiple intents on managed launchpad
entry.content:
Hi,

Did anyone find an answer on how to do this without creating local copies? Or any official feedback from SAP about it?

Thanks,

Brendan

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project: Add arbitrary fields and controll...
entry.content:
I don't see any issue.

what you have tried?

add fragment

simply add the jsonmodel in ext controller

assign model to the fragment

entry.title: Re: How can we use a feature that comes with new version,...
entry.content:
if you are ok with running the app standalone, you can load latest ui5 lib from CDN in your index html

But sap probably won't support you if anything goes wrong.

entry.title: Re: Error 'Enter order unit' in PIR Change using IDOC INFREC01
entry.content:
Hi Raul,

I am facing with similar issue, could I ask how did you "mapped to the iDOC to have the same value from EINA-MEINS to EINEM-BPRME"?

Thank you so much.

Lam.

entry.title: Code de parrainage Bitget qsk6 - Bonus d'inscription Bitget 2024
entry.content: Le code de parrainage Bitget qsk6 offre une réduction de 50 % sur les frais de négociation pour les nouveaux comptes Bitget. De plus, il donne accès à des promotions en cours où les utilisateurs peuvent gagner des récompenses cryptographiques et tenter de gagner des cadeaux cryptographiques. Ces avantages servent de bonus d'inscription gratuits pour les comptes Bitget nouvellement enregistrés. Découvrez comment vous inscrire sur Bitget pour profiter de ces récompenses !

entry.title: Re: Code de parrainage Bitget qsk6 - Bonus d'inscription...

De plus, il donne accès à des promotions en cours où les utilisateurs peuvent gagner des récompenses cryptographiques et tenter de gagner des cadeaux cryptographiques. Ces avantages servent de bonus d'inscription gratuits pour les comptes Bitget nouvellement enregistrés. Découvrez comment vous inscrire sur Bitget pour profiter de ces récompenses !

entry.title: Re: Code de parrainage Bitget qsk6 - Bonus d'inscription...
entry.content: Le code de parrainage Bitget qsk6 offre une réduction de 50 % sur les frais de négociation pour les nouveaux comptes Bitget. De plus, il donne accès à des promotions en cours où les utilisateurs peuvent gagner des récompenses cryptographiques et tenter de gagner des cadeaux cryptographiques. Ces avantages servent de bonus d'inscription gratuits pour les comptes Bitget nouvellement enregistrés. Découvrez comment vous inscrire sur Bitget pour profiter de ces récompenses !

entry.title: Codice referral Bitget qsk6 - Iscriviti a Bitget 2024
entry.content: Il Codice referral Bitget "qsk6" offre ai nuovi conti Bitget uno sconto del 50% sulle commissioni di negoziazione. Inoltre, dà accesso a promozioni in corso, offrendo agli utenti l'opportunità di guadagnare premi in criptovaluta e partecipare a omaggi di criptovaluta. Questi vantaggi fungono da bonus di iscrizione gratuiti per gli account Bitget appena registrati. Scopri come registrarti su Bitget per sfruttare al massimo questi vantaggi!

entry.title: Re: Codice referral Bitget qsk6 - Iscriviti a Bitget 2024
entry.content: Codice referral BITGET: qsk6 (Bonus di iscrizione BITGET 1000 USDT + commissione di trading scontata del 50%). Registrati con il codice di riferimento BITGET qsk6 e ricevi un bonus fino a 1000 USDT, oltre al 50% di sconto sulle commissioni di negoziazione aggiornamento 2024.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services
entry.content: Not bad though, in the first attempt it wasn't able to identify any of the ingredients from the document. But I tried to mark them explicitly (only for the first 5), then on my second run of the same document it tried to map those exact same lines.

entry.title: Kode Referral Bitget qsk6 - Bonus Pengguna Baru Bitget 2024
entry.content: Kode Referral Bitget "qsk6" memberi akun Bitget baru diskon 50% untuk biaya perdagangan. Selain itu, ini membuka akses ke promosi yang sedang berlangsung, memberikan pengguna peluang untuk mendapatkan hadiah kripto dan terlibat dalam hadiah kripto. Keuntungan ini berfungsi sebagai bonus pendaftaran gratis untuk akun Bitget yang baru terdaftar. Temukan cara mendaftar di Bitget untuk memanfaatkan sepenuhnya manfaat ini!

entry.title: Unable to write select query in BW transformations
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I want to display current date in one of the field routine of the BW transformations. I wrote the below code in field routine and getting the error message as
Incorrect syntax error near :CUR_DATE.

outtab = select (select current_date into CUR_DATE from dummy AS "CUR_DATE"),
"RECORD",
"SQL__PROCEDURE__SOURCE__RECORD"
from :INTAB;

Please guide me how to solve this error.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Video URL in Guided Tour
entry.content: Did you use the 'embed' option? Chances are SharePoint isn't serving the file in a format that can be played in an iFrame.

entry.title: Código de referidos Bitget qsk6 - Registro de Bitget 2024
entry.content: El Código de referidos Bitget "qsk6" proporciona a las nuevas cuentas de Bitget un 50% de descuento en las tarifas comerciales. Además, desbloquea el acceso a promociones en curso, brindando a los usuarios la oportunidad de ganar recompensas criptográficas y participar en obsequios criptográficos. Estas ventajas sirven como bonos de registro gratuitos para cuentas Bitget registradas recientemente. ¡Descubra cómo registrarse en Bitget para aprovechar al máximo estos beneficios!

entry.title: Re: Código de referidos Bitget qsk6 - Registro de Bitget...
entry.content: ¿Busca el Código de referidos Bitget? El último para 2024 es qsk6. El uso de este código le otorga un 30% de descuento en las operaciones. Además, los nuevos usuarios de Bitget que se registren con el código promocional "qsk6" pueden recibir una recompensa promocional exclusiva de hasta $1000 USDT.

entry.title: Código de referidos Bitget qsk6 - Mejor código de referidos Bitget 2024
entry.content: El código de referidos Bitget "qsk6" ofrece a las nuevas cuentas de Bitget un 50% de descuento en las tarifas comerciales. Este código de referencia es exclusivo para usuarios que se registran en el intercambio por primera vez. Lamentablemente, si ya tiene una cuenta, no puede utilizar el código de referencia.

entry.title: Re: Código de referidos Bitget qsk6 - Mejor código de ref...
entry.content: El código de referidos Bitget "qsk6" ofrece a las nuevas cuentas de Bitget un 50% de descuento en las tarifas comerciales. Este código de referencia es exclusivo para usuarios que se registran en el intercambio por primera vez. Lamentablemente, si ya tiene una cuenta, no puede utilizar el código de referencia.

entry.title: Bitget Referans Kodu: qsk6 – En İyi Bitget Referans Kodu 2024
entry.content: Bitget Referans Kodu "qsk6", yeni Bitget hesaplarına işlem ücretlerinde %50 indirim sunar. Bu yönlendirme kodu borsaya ilk kez kayıt olan kullanıcılara özeldir. Maalesef zaten bir hesabınız varsa yönlendirme kodunu kullanamazsınız.

entry.title: Re: Bitget Referans Kodu: qsk6 – En İyi Bitget Referans K...
entry.content: Bitget Referans Kodu "qsk6", yeni Bitget hesaplarına işlem ücretlerinde %50 indirim sunar. Bu yönlendirme kodu borsaya ilk kez kayıt olan kullanıcılara özeldir. Maalesef zaten bir hesabınız varsa yönlendirme kodunu kullanamazsınız.

entry.title: Bitget Referans Kodu: qsk6 (En İyi Bitget Referans Kodu)
entry.content: Bitget Referans Kodunu mu arıyorsunuz? 2024 için en son sürüm qsk6'dır. Bu kodu kullanmanız size işlemlerde %30 indirim sağlayacaktır. Ek olarak, Bitget'te "qsk6" promosyon koduyla kaydolan yeni kullanıcılar, 1000 USDT'ye kadar özel bir promosyon ödülü alabilir. Bitget Referans Kodu nedir? Bitget uygulamasındaki "qsk6" kodu yönlendirme kodu görevi görmektedir. Bu kodu girmeniz, işlem ücretlerini sürekli olarak azaltmanıza ve işlemlerinizde %30 indirim almanıza yardımcı olur. Ayrıca, referans kodunuzu arkadaşlarınızla paylaşarak %50 oranında cömert bir ödül kazanma şansına sahip olursunuz. Bu kodu kullanmak, ücretleri düşürmek, potansiyel olarak kârınızı artırmak ve platformu başkalarına tanıtmak için değerli bir fırsat sunar. 2024 Yılının En İyi Bitget Referans Kodu Nedir? Şiddetle tavsiye edilen Bitget yönlendirme kodu qsk6'dır. Kayıt sırasında bu kodu kullandığınızda, 100$ tutarında cömert bir bonus alacaksınız. Kodunuzu arkadaşlarınızla paylaşmak size %50 gibi önemli bir komisyo

entry.title: Bitget 추천 코드: qsk6 (최고의 Bitget 추천 코드)
entry.content: Bitget 추천 코드 "qsk6"은 Bitget 신규 계정에 대한 거래 수수료 50% 할인을 제공합니다. 또한 진행 중인 프로모션에 대한 액세스 권한을 부여하여 사용자에게 암호화폐 보상을 받고 암호화폐 경품에 참여할 수 있는 기회를 제공합니다. 이러한 혜택은 최근 등록된 Bitget 계정에 대한 무료 가입 보너스 역할을 합니다. 이러한 혜택을 극대화하려면 Bitget에 등록하는 방법을 알아보세요!

entry.title: Re: Bitget 추천 코드: qsk6 (최고의 Bitget 추천 코드)
entry.content: Bitget 추천 코드: qsk6 (최고의 Bitget 추천 코드) Bitget 추천 코드 "qsk6"은 Bitget 신규 계정에 대한 거래 수수료 50% 할인을 제공합니다. 또한 진행 중인 프로모션에 대한 액세스 권한을 부여하여 사용자에게 암호화폐 보상을 받고 암호화폐 경품에 참여할 수 있는 기회를 제공합니다. 이러한 혜택은 최근 등록된 Bitget 계정에 대한 무료 가입 보너스 역할을 합니다. 이러한 혜택을 극대화하려면 Bitget에 등록하는 방법을 알아보세요!

entry.title: Bitget 推薦碼：qsk6（最佳 Bitget 推薦碼）
entry.content: Bitget 推薦碼「qsk6」為新 Bitget 帳戶提供 50% 的交易費用折扣。 此外，它還允許用戶參與正在進行的促銷活動，為用戶提供賺取加密貨幣獎勵和參與加密貨幣贈品的機會。 這些優勢可作為最近註冊 Bitget 帳戶的免費開戶獎金。 探索如何在 Bitget 上註冊以最大化這些好處！

entry.title: Re: Bitget 推薦碼：qsk6（最佳 Bitget 推薦碼）
entry.content: Bitget 推薦碼「qsk6」為新 Bitget 帳戶提供 50% 的交易費用折扣。 此外，它還允許用戶參與正在進行的促銷活動，為用戶提供賺取加密貨幣獎勵和參與加密貨幣贈品的機會。 這些優勢可作為最近註冊 Bitget 帳戶的免費開戶獎金。 探索如何在 Bitget 上註冊以最大化這些好處！

entry.title: Bitget 紹介コード: qsk6 (最高の Bitget 紹介コード)
entry.content: Bitget 紹介コード「qsk6」を使用すると、新規 Bitget アカウントの取引手数料が 50% 割引になります。 さらに、進行中のプロモーションへのアクセスが許可され、ユーザーに暗号通貨の報酬を獲得し、暗号通貨のプレゼントに参加する機会が提供されます。 これらの利点は、最近登録された Bitget アカウントに対する無料のサインアップ ボーナスとして機能します。 これらのメリットを最大限に活用するために Bitget に登録する方法を調べてください。

entry.title: Re: Jump from DAYPR to detailed log / Incorrect generatio...
entry.content: A mi me paso, y me faltaban registros en la tabla T554C.
